index 0000000..59414bb
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.test.mjs
@@ -0,0 +1,318 @@
+import assert from "node:assert/strict";
+import { readFileSync } from "node:fs";
+import { join, resolve } from "node:path";
+import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
+
+import {
+  POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY,
+  POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_CAPABILITY_ID,
+  POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_METHODS,
+  createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate
+} from "../src/shared/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.mjs";
+import {
+  CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
+  createGovernedCanonicalWriteTransaction
+} from "../src/shared/governed-write-transaction.mjs";
+import { createAgentACandidateGenerationRecord } from "../src/shared/agent-a-candidate-generation.mjs";
+import { createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition } from "../src/shared/agent-a-promotion-readiness.mjs";
+import { createAgentAPromotionRequestEnvelope } from "../src/shared/agent-a-promotion-request.mjs";
+import { createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord } from "../src/shared/agent-a-write-admission.mjs";
+
+const __dirname = fileURLToPath(new URL(".", import.meta.url));
+const root = resolve(__dirname, "..");
+// RED evidence before implementation: ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for the new shared module.
+const sourceText = readFileSync(
+  join(root, "src/shared/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.mjs"),
+  "utf8"
+);
+
+const hashA = `sha256:${"a".repeat(64)}`;
+const hashB = `sha256:${"b".repeat(64)}`;
+const hashC = `sha256:${"c".repeat(64)}`;
+const hashD = `sha256:${"d".repeat(64)}`;
+
+const falseAuthorityFlags = Object.freeze({
+  providerCallsAllowed: false,
+  parserExecutionAllowed: false,
+  filesystemWriteAllowed: false,
+  sourceWriteAllowed: false,
+  rendererIpcExpansionAllowed: false,
+  rtmGenerationAllowed: false,
+  blkLinkAllowed: false,
+  beoPublicationAllowed: false,
+  protectedBodyAccessAllowed: false,
+  rawEvidenceSerializationAllowed: false
+});
+
+function candidateRecord(sequence = 7) {
+  return createAgentACandidateGenerationRecord(
+    {
+      source: "agent-a-bounded-output",
+      agentRole: "agent-a",
+      providerStatus: "not-called",
+      outputClass: "candidate-evidence",
+      contentFingerprint: hashC,
+      boundedEvidence: "present",
+      sanitizedSummary: "bounded Agent A evidence summary"
+    },
+    sequence
+  );
+}
+
+function admissionRecord(sequence = 7) {
+  const candidate = candidateRecord(sequence);
+  const readiness = createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition(candidate, 2);
+  const request = createAgentAPromotionRequestEnvelope(candidate, readiness, sequence);
+  const flags = { ...request.authorityFlags };
+  return createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord(
+    request,
+    {
+      governedFlowKind: "agent-a-governed-canonical-write",
+      invocationKind: "write-intent-admission",
+      mutationMode: "non-mutating",
+      effect: "status-only",
+      providerStatus: "not-called",
+      operatorReviewRequired: true,
+      promotionRequestId: request.promotionRequestId,
+      promotionReadinessId: request.promotionReadinessId,
+      candidateId: request.candidateId,
+      agentCandidateId: request.agentCandidateId,
+      candidateContentFingerprint: request.candidateContentFingerprint,
+      authorityFlags: flags,
+      ...flags
+    },
+    sequence
+  );
+}
+
+function transactionRecord(patch = {}) {
+  const txFlags = {
+    adjacentFileWriteAllowed: false,
+    multiFileWriteAllowed: false,
+    packageAliasWriteAllowed: false,
+    uncontrolledPackageWriteAllowed: false,
+    runtimeDispatchAllowed: false,
+    publicationAllowed: false,
+    callerRecoveryRecordAllowed: false
+  };
+  return createGovernedCanonicalWriteTransaction(
+    admissionRecord(),
+    {
+      targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
+      currentVersionHash: hashA,
+      packageKind: "controlled-fixture-package",
+      targetKind: "single-file",
+      fileCount: 1
+    },
+    {
+      targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
+      expectedCurrentVersionHash: hashA,
+      candidateContentFingerprint: hashC,
+      candidateReplacementHash: hashB,
+      fixtureOnlyOperatorReviewConfirmed: true,
+      authorityFlags: txFlags,
+      ...txFlags,
+      ...patch
+    }
+  );
+}
+
+function refreshEvidence(tx, patch = {}) {
+  return {
+    refreshKind: "post-transaction-readiness-refresh",
+    refreshStatus: "refresh-complete",
+    effect: "status-only",
+    providerStatus: "not-called",
+    parserExecutionStatus: "not-run",
+    filesystemWriteStatus: "not-written",
+    sourceWriteStatus: "not-written",
+    transactionId: tx.transactionId,
+    writeIntentId: tx.writeIntentId,
+    targetVersionHash: tx.targetVersionHash,
+    afterVersionHash: tx.afterVersionHash,
+    readinessRefreshRequired: tx.readinessRefreshRequired,
+    operatorReviewRequired: true,
+    authorityFlags: { ...falseAuthorityFlags },
+    ...falseAuthorityFlags,
+    ...patch
+  };
+}
+
+function assertRecordShape(record) {
+  assert.deepEqual(Object.keys(record), [
+    "readinessGateId",
+    "transactionId",
+    "writeIntentId",
+    "targetVersionHash",
+    "afterVersionHash",
+    "candidateContentFingerprint",
+    "readinessState",
+    "readyPresentationAllowed",
+    "refreshEvidenceStatus",
+    "failureReasons",
+    "readinessEvidenceHash",
+    "gateEvidenceHash",
+    "authorityFlags"
+  ]);
+  assert.match(record.gateEvidenceHash, /''^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
+  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(record), true);
+  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(record.authorityFlags), true);
+  assert.deepEqual(record.authorityFlags, falseAuthorityFlags);
+}
+
+{
+  assert.equal(
+    POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_CAPABILITY_ID,
+    "post-transaction-readiness-refresh-gate"
+  );
+  assert.deepEqual(POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_METHODS, [
+    "createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate"
+  ]);
+  assert.equal(
+    POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY.readinessStates.includes(
+      "post-transaction-ready"
+    ),
+    true
+  );
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, refreshEvidence(tx));
+  assertRecordShape(gate);
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessGateId, "post-transaction-readiness-refresh:0007");
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-ready");
+  assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, true);
+  assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-complete");
+  assert.deepEqual(gate.failureReasons, []);
+  assert.match(gate.readinessEvidenceHash, /''^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
+}
+
+{
+  const blockedTx = transactionRecord({ fixtureOnlyOperatorReviewConfirmed: false });
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(
+    blockedTx,
+    refreshEvidence(blockedTx)
+  );
+  assertRecordShape(gate);
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-not-required");
+  assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+  assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-not-required");
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessEvidenceHash, "");
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("transaction-not-committed"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx);
+  assertRecordShape(gate);
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-blocked");
+  assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+  assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-missing");
+  assert.deepEqual(gate.failureReasons, ["missing-refresh-evidence"]);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  for (const stalePatch of [
+    { transactionId: "governed-write-transaction:9999" },
+    { writeIntentId: "agent-a-write-intent:9999" },
+    { targetVersionHash: hashD },
+    { afterVersionHash: hashD }
+  ]) {
+    const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(
+      tx,
+      refreshEvidence(tx, stalePatch)
+    );
+    assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+    assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-malformed");
+    assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("stale-refresh-evidence"), true);
+  }
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  for (const badEvidence of [
+    null,
+    () => undefined,
+    Symbol("bad"),
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), extraField: "unexpected" },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), refreshStatus: "ready" },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), authorityFlags: { ...falseAuthorityFlags, rtmGenerationAllowed: true } },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), providerCallsAllowed: true },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), sourceText: "raw SysML body text" },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), rawPrompt: "RAW_PROMPT" }
+  ]) {
+    const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, badEvidence);
+    assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+    assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-blocked");
+    assert.equal(gate.readinessEvidenceHash, "");
+  }
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const { proxy, revoke } = Proxy.revocable(refreshEvidence(tx), {});
+  revoke();
+  assert.doesNotThrow(() => createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, proxy));
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, proxy);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("hostile-caller-object"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const getterEvidence = { ...refreshEvidence(tx) };
+  Object.defineProperty(getterEvidence, "refreshStatus", {
+    enumerable: true,
+    get() {
+      throw new Error("getter should not execute");
+    }
+  });
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, getterEvidence);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("hostile-caller-object"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const evidence = refreshEvidence(tx);
+  evidence.self = evidence;
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, evidence);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("unsupported-refresh-evidence-field"), true);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("hostile-caller-object"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const evidence = refreshEvidence(tx);
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, evidence);
+  const serialized = JSON.stringify(gate);
+  for (const forbidden of [
+    "raw SysML",
+    "RAW_PROMPT",
+    "providerPayload",
+    "credential",
+    "sourceText",
+    CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH
+  ]) {
+    assert.equal(serialized.includes(forbidden), false, forbidden);
+  }
+}
+
+{
+  for (const forbiddenSourceToken of [
+    "fetch(",
+    "XMLHttpRequest",
+    "ipcRenderer",
+    "writeFileSync",
+    "readFileSync(",
+    "providerPayload",
+    "providerClient",
+    "generateRTM",
+    "publishBEO",
+    "blk-link"
+  ]) {
+    assert.equal(sourceText.includes(forbiddenSourceToken), false, forbiddenSourceToken);
+  }
+}
+
+console.log("Governed post-transaction readiness refresh tests passed.");

+// K2-026 GOVERNED POST-TRANSACTION READINESS REFRESH: pure-data readiness gate only.
+// Trace: docs/traceability/K2_traceability.yaml (entry K2-026); Direct REQ: REQ-KN-075.
+// NO_PRODUCT_BEHAVIOR_K2_001: no filesystem writes, parser execution, provider calls, IPC, RTM, BLK link publication, BEO publication, or canonical mutation behavior.
+
+import { createHash } from "node:crypto";
+import { types as nodeUtilTypes } from "node:util";
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_CAPABILITY_ID =
+  "post-transaction-readiness-refresh-gate";
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_METHODS = Object.freeze([
+  "createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_STATES = Object.freeze([
+  "post-transaction-ready",
+  "post-transaction-blocked",
+  "post-transaction-not-required"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_EVIDENCE_STATUSES = Object.freeze([
+  "refresh-complete",
+  "refresh-missing",
+  "refresh-malformed",
+  "refresh-not-required"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_FAILURE_REASONS = Object.freeze([
+  "transaction-not-committed",
+  "missing-refresh-evidence",
+  "malformed-transaction-record",
+  "malformed-refresh-evidence",
+  "stale-refresh-evidence",
+  "contradictory-refresh-evidence",
+  "unsupported-refresh-evidence-field",
+  "hostile-caller-object",
+  "denied-authority-claim",
+  "raw-material-leakage-claim"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY = Object.freeze({
+  readinessStates: POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_STATES,
+  refreshEvidenceStatuses: POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_EVIDENCE_STATUSES,
+  failureReasons: POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_FAILURE_REASONS
+});
+
+const OUTPUT_KEYS = Object.freeze([
+  "readinessGateId",
+  "transactionId",
+  "writeIntentId",
+  "targetVersionHash",
+  "afterVersionHash",
+  "candidateContentFingerprint",
+  "readinessState",
+  "readyPresentationAllowed",
+  "refreshEvidenceStatus",
+  "failureReasons",
+  "readinessEvidenceHash",
+  "gateEvidenceHash",
+  "authorityFlags"
+]);
+
+const FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS = deepFreeze({
+  providerCallsAllowed: false,
+  parserExecutionAllowed: false,
+  filesystemWriteAllowed: false,
+  sourceWriteAllowed: false,
+  rendererIpcExpansionAllowed: false,
+  rtmGenerationAllowed: false,
+  blkLinkAllowed: false,
+  beoPublicationAllowed: false,
+  protectedBodyAccessAllowed: false,
+  rawEvidenceSerializationAllowed: false
+});
+
+const REQUIRED_REFRESH_FIELDS = Object.freeze([
+  "refreshKind",
+  "refreshStatus",
+  "effect",
+  "providerStatus",
+  "parserExecutionStatus",
+  "filesystemWriteStatus",
+  "sourceWriteStatus",
+  "transactionId",
+  "writeIntentId",
+  "targetVersionHash",
+  "afterVersionHash",
+  "readinessRefreshRequired",
+  "operatorReviewRequired",
+  "authorityFlags"
+]);
+
+const OPTIONAL_FALSE_FLAG_FIELDS = Object.freeze(Object.keys(FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS));
+const ALLOWED_REFRESH_FIELDS = new Set([
+  ...REQUIRED_REFRESH_FIELDS,
+  ...OPTIONAL_FALSE_FLAG_FIELDS
+]);
+
+const DENIED_FIELD_PARTS = Object.freeze([
+  ["provider"],
+  ["parser"],
+  ["runtime"],
+  ["dispatch"],
+  ["filesystem"],
+  ["source"],
+  ["write"],
+  ["mutation"],
+  ["canonical"],
+  ["save"],
+  ["export"],
+  ["session"],
+  ["publication"],
+  ["signer"],
+  ["storage"],
+  ["ledger"],
+  ["approval"],
+  ["rt", "m"],
+  ["blk", "link"],
+  ["beo"],
+  ["ipc"]
+]);
+
+const RAW_FIELD_PARTS = Object.freeze([
+  ["raw"],
+  ["source", "text"],
+  ["prompt"],
+  ["body"],
+  ["sysml"],
+  ["kerml"],
+  ["path"],
+  ["file"],
+  ["diagnostic"],
+  ["credential"],
+  ["secret"],
+  ["token"],
+  ["api", "key"],
+  ["provider", "payload"],
+  ["provider", "request"],
+  ["provider", "response"]
+]);
+
+function deepFreeze(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
+  if (!value || typeof value !== "object" || Object.isFrozen(value)) {
+    return value;
+  }
+  if (seen.has(value)) {
+    return value;
+  }
+  seen.add(value);
+  for (const child of Object.values(value)) {
+    deepFreeze(child, seen);
+  }
+  return Object.freeze(value);
+}
+
+function canonicalJson(value) {
+  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
+    return `[${value.map((item) => canonicalJson(item)).join(",")}]`;
+  }
+  if (value && typeof value === "object") {
+    return `{${Object.keys(value)
+      .sort()
+      .map((key) => `${JSON.stringify(key)}:${canonicalJson(value[key])}`)
+      .join(",")}}`;
+  }
+  return JSON.stringify(value);
+}
+
+function evidenceHash(value) {
+  return `sha256:${createHash("sha256").update(canonicalJson(value)).digest("hex")}`;
+}
+
+function normalizeToken(value) {
+  return String(value).toLowerCase().replace(/[''^a-z0-9]/gu, "");
+}
+
+function hasParts(normalized, parts) {
+  return normalized.includes(parts.join(""));
+}
+
+function addReason(reasons, reason) {
+  if (!reasons.includes(reason)) {
+    reasons.push(reason);
+  }
+}
+
+function descriptorsFor(value, reasons) {
+  try {
+    if (!value || typeof value !== "object") {
+      return null;
+    }
+    if (nodeUtilTypes.isProxy(value)) {
+      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+      return null;
+    }
+    return Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value);
+  } catch {
+    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    return null;
+  }
+}
+
+function dataValue(descriptors, key, reasons) {
+  const descriptor = descriptors?.[key];
+  if (!descriptor) {
+    return undefined;
+  }
+  if ("get" in descriptor || "set" in descriptor || !Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(descriptor, "value")) {
+    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    return undefined;
+  }
+  return descriptor.value;
+}
+
+function isHash(value) {
+  return typeof value === "string" && /''^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u.test(value);
+}
+
+function validTransactionId(value) {
+  return (
+    typeof value === "string" &&
+    value.startsWith("governed-write-transaction:") &&
+    /''^'"\\d{4}"'$/u.test(value.slice("governed-write-transaction:".length))
+  );
+}
+
+function validWriteIntentId(value) {
+  return (
+    typeof value === "string" &&
+    value.startsWith("agent-a-write-intent:") &&
+    /''^'"\\d{4}"'$/u.test(value.slice("agent-a-write-intent:".length))
+  );
+}
+
+function analyzeTransaction(transactionRecord) {
+  const reasons = [];
+  const descriptors = descriptorsFor(transactionRecord, reasons);
+  const record = {
+    transactionId: "",
+    writeIntentId: "",
+    targetVersionHash: "",
+    afterVersionHash: "",
+    candidateContentFingerprint: "",
+    committed: false,
+    refreshRequired: false,
+    failureReasons: []
+  };
+
+  if (!descriptors) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+    return { record, reasons };
+  }
+
+  const transactionId = dataValue(descriptors, "transactionId", reasons);
+  const writeIntentId = dataValue(descriptors, "writeIntentId", reasons);
+  const targetVersionHash = dataValue(descriptors, "targetVersionHash", reasons);
+  const afterVersionHash = dataValue(descriptors, "afterVersionHash", reasons);
+  const candidateContentFingerprint = dataValue(
+    descriptors,
+    "candidateContentFingerprint",
+    reasons
+  );
+  const transactionState = dataValue(descriptors, "transactionState", reasons);
+  const commitStatus = dataValue(descriptors, "commitStatus", reasons);
+  const recoveryStatus = dataValue(descriptors, "recoveryStatus", reasons);
+  const readinessRefreshRequired = dataValue(
+    descriptors,
+    "readinessRefreshRequired",
+    reasons
+  );
+  const failureReasons = dataValue(descriptors, "failureReasons", reasons);
+  const authorityFlags = dataValue(descriptors, "authorityFlags", reasons);
+
+  if (!validTransactionId(transactionId)) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+  } else {
+    record.transactionId = transactionId;
+  }
+  if (!validWriteIntentId(writeIntentId)) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+  } else {
+    record.writeIntentId = writeIntentId;
+  }
+  if (!isHash(targetVersionHash) || !isHash(afterVersionHash) || !isHash(candidateContentFingerprint)) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+  } else {
+    record.targetVersionHash = targetVersionHash;
+    record.afterVersionHash = afterVersionHash;
+    record.candidateContentFingerprint = candidateContentFingerprint;
+  }
+  if (!Array.isArray(failureReasons)) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+  } else {
+    record.failureReasons = failureReasons.filter((reason) => typeof reason === "string");
+  }
+  if (!authorityFlags || typeof authorityFlags !== "object") {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+  }
+
+  record.committed =
+    transactionState === "transaction-committed" &&
+    commitStatus === "fixture-package-record-updated" &&
+    recoveryStatus === "recovery-recorded" &&
+    readinessRefreshRequired === true &&
+    Array.isArray(failureReasons) &&
+    failureReasons.length === 0 &&
+    reasons.length === 0;
+  record.refreshRequired = readinessRefreshRequired === true;
+
+  if (!record.committed) {
+    addReason(reasons, "transaction-not-committed");
+  }
+
+  return { record, reasons };
+}
+
+function scanEvidenceValue(value, reasons, depth = 0, seen = new WeakSet()) {
+  if (depth > 8) {
+    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    return;
+  }
+  if (typeof value === "string") {
+    const normalized = normalizeToken(value);
+    if (DENIED_FIELD_PARTS.some((parts) => hasParts(normalized, parts))) {
+      addReason(reasons, "denied-authority-claim");
+    }
+    if (RAW_FIELD_PARTS.some((parts) => hasParts(normalized, parts))) {
+      addReason(reasons, "raw-material-leakage-claim");
+    }
+    return;
+  }
+  if (value === null || typeof value === "boolean") {
+    return;
+  }
+  if (typeof value === "number") {
+    if (!Number.isFinite(value)) {
+      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    }
+    return;
+  }
+  if (typeof value === "bigint" || typeof value === "symbol" || typeof value === "function") {
+    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    return;
+  }
+  if (!value || typeof value !== "object") {
+    return;
+  }
+  if (seen.has(value)) {
+    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    return;
+  }
+  seen.add(value);
+  const descriptors = descriptorsFor(value, reasons);
+  if (!descriptors) {
+    return;
+  }
+  for (const [key, descriptor] of Object.entries(descriptors)) {
+    const normalizedKey = normalizeToken(key);
+    if (DENIED_FIELD_PARTS.some((parts) => hasParts(normalizedKey, parts))) {
+      addReason(reasons, "denied-authority-claim");
+    }
+    if (RAW_FIELD_PARTS.some((parts) => hasParts(normalizedKey, parts))) {
+      addReason(reasons, "raw-material-leakage-claim");
+    }
+    if ("get" in descriptor || "set" in descriptor) {
+      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+      continue;
+    }
+    scanEvidenceValue(descriptor.value, reasons, depth + 1, seen);
+  }
+}
+
+function analyzeRefreshEvidence(evidence, transaction) {
+  const reasons = [];
+  const descriptors = descriptorsFor(evidence, reasons);
+  if (!descriptors) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-refresh-evidence");
+    return { reasons, sanitized: null };
+  }
+
+  const keys = Object.keys(descriptors).sort();
+  for (const key of keys) {
+    if (!ALLOWED_REFRESH_FIELDS.has(key)) {
+      addReason(reasons, "unsupported-refresh-evidence-field");
+      scanEvidenceValue(key, reasons);
+      scanEvidenceValue(dataValue(descriptors, key, reasons), reasons);
+    }
+  }
+  for (const key of REQUIRED_REFRESH_FIELDS) {
+    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(descriptors, key)) {
+      addReason(reasons, "malformed-refresh-evidence");
+    }
+  }
+
+  const value = (key) => dataValue(descriptors, key, reasons);
+  const authorityFlags = value("authorityFlags");
+  const authorityDescriptors = descriptorsFor(authorityFlags, reasons);
+  if (!authorityDescriptors) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-refresh-evidence");
+  }
+  for (const flag of OPTIONAL_FALSE_FLAG_FIELDS) {
+    const nested = authorityDescriptors ? dataValue(authorityDescriptors, flag, reasons) : undefined;
+    if (nested !== false) {
+      addReason(reasons, "denied-authority-claim");
+    }
+    if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(descriptors, flag) && value(flag) !== false) {
+      addReason(reasons, "denied-authority-claim");
+    }
+  }
+
+  const expected = {
+    refreshKind: "post-transaction-readiness-refresh",
+    refreshStatus: "refresh-complete",
+    effect: "status-only",
+    providerStatus: "not-called",
+    parserExecutionStatus: "not-run",
+    filesystemWriteStatus: "not-written",
+    sourceWriteStatus: "not-written",
+    transactionId: transaction.transactionId,
+    writeIntentId: transaction.writeIntentId,
+    targetVersionHash: transaction.targetVersionHash,
+    afterVersionHash: transaction.afterVersionHash,
+    readinessRefreshRequired: true,
+    operatorReviewRequired: true
+  };
+
+  for (const [key, expectedValue] of Object.entries(expected)) {
+    if (value(key) !== expectedValue) {
+      addReason(
+        reasons,
+        key === "transactionId" ||
+          key === "writeIntentId" ||
+          key === "targetVersionHash" ||
+          key === "afterVersionHash"
+          ? "stale-refresh-evidence"
+          : "contradictory-refresh-evidence"
+      );
+    }
+  }
+
+  if (reasons.length > 0) {
+    return { reasons, sanitized: null };
+  }
+
+  const sanitized = {
+    refreshKind: expected.refreshKind,
+    refreshStatus: expected.refreshStatus,
+    effect: expected.effect,
+    transactionId: expected.transactionId,
+    writeIntentId: expected.writeIntentId,
+    targetVersionHash: expected.targetVersionHash,
+    afterVersionHash: expected.afterVersionHash,
+    readinessRefreshRequired: true,
+    operatorReviewRequired: true,
+    authorityFlags: FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS
+  };
+  return { reasons, sanitized };
+}
+
+function createRecord({ transaction, state, evidenceStatus, reasons, evidence }) {
+  const readinessEvidenceHash = evidence ? evidenceHash(evidence) : "";
+  const material = {
+    readinessGateId: gateIdFor(transaction.transactionId),
+    transactionId: transaction.transactionId,
+    writeIntentId: transaction.writeIntentId,
+    targetVersionHash: transaction.targetVersionHash,
+    afterVersionHash: transaction.afterVersionHash,
+    candidateContentFingerprint: transaction.candidateContentFingerprint,
+    readinessState: state,
+    readyPresentationAllowed: state === "post-transaction-ready",
+    refreshEvidenceStatus: evidenceStatus,
+    failureReasons: reasons,
+    readinessEvidenceHash,
+    authorityFlags: FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS
+  };
+  const gateEvidenceHash = evidenceHash(material);
+  return deepFreeze({
+    readinessGateId: material.readinessGateId,
+    transactionId: material.transactionId,
+    writeIntentId: material.writeIntentId,
+    targetVersionHash: material.targetVersionHash,
+    afterVersionHash: material.afterVersionHash,
+    candidateContentFingerprint: material.candidateContentFingerprint,
+    readinessState: material.readinessState,
+    readyPresentationAllowed: material.readyPresentationAllowed,
+    refreshEvidenceStatus: material.refreshEvidenceStatus,
+    failureReasons: material.failureReasons,
+    readinessEvidenceHash: material.readinessEvidenceHash,
+    gateEvidenceHash,
+    authorityFlags: FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS
+  });
+}
+
+function gateIdFor(transactionId) {
+  const suffix = validTransactionId(transactionId)
+    ? transactionId.slice("governed-write-transaction:".length)
+    : "0000";
+  return `post-transaction-readiness-refresh:${suffix}`;
+}
+
+export function createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(
+  transactionRecord = undefined,
+  refreshEvidence = undefined
+) {
+  const transactionAnalysis = analyzeTransaction(transactionRecord);
+  const transaction = transactionAnalysis.record;
+  const reasons = [...transactionAnalysis.reasons];
+
+  if (!transaction.committed) {
+    return createRecord({
+      transaction,
+      state: "post-transaction-not-required",
+      evidenceStatus: "refresh-not-required",
+      reasons,
+      evidence: null
+    });
+  }
+
+  if (refreshEvidence === undefined || refreshEvidence === null) {
+    return createRecord({
+      transaction,
+      state: "post-transaction-blocked",
+      evidenceStatus: "refresh-missing",
+      reasons: ["missing-refresh-evidence"],
+      evidence: null
+    });
+  }
+
+  const evidenceAnalysis = analyzeRefreshEvidence(refreshEvidence, transaction);
+  if (evidenceAnalysis.reasons.length > 0) {
+    return createRecord({
+      transaction,
+      state: "post-transaction-blocked",
+      evidenceStatus: "refresh-malformed",
+      reasons: evidenceAnalysis.reasons,
+      evidence: null
+    });
+  }
+
+  return createRecord({
+    transaction,
+    state: "post-transaction-ready",
+    evidenceStatus: "refresh-complete",
+    reasons: [],
+    evidence: evidenceAnalysis.sanitized
+  });
+}

diff --git a/tests/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.test.mjs b/tests/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.test.mjs
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..59414bb
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.test.mjs
@@ -0,0 +1,318 @@
+import assert from "node:assert/strict";
+import { readFileSync } from "node:fs";
+import { join, resolve } from "node:path";
+import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
+
+import {
+  POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY,
+  POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_CAPABILITY_ID,
+  POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_METHODS,
+  createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate
+} from "../src/shared/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.mjs";
+import {
+  CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
+  createGovernedCanonicalWriteTransaction
+} from "../src/shared/governed-write-transaction.mjs";
+import { createAgentACandidateGenerationRecord } from "../src/shared/agent-a-candidate-generation.mjs";
+import { createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition } from "../src/shared/agent-a-promotion-readiness.mjs";
+import { createAgentAPromotionRequestEnvelope } from "../src/shared/agent-a-promotion-request.mjs";
+import { createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord } from "../src/shared/agent-a-write-admission.mjs";
+
+const __dirname = fileURLToPath(new URL(".", import.meta.url));
+const root = resolve(__dirname, "..");
+// RED evidence before implementation: ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for the new shared module.
+const sourceText = readFileSync(
+  join(root, "src/shared/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.mjs"),
+  "utf8"
+);
+
+const hashA = `sha256:${"a".repeat(64)}`;
+const hashB = `sha256:${"b".repeat(64)}`;
+const hashC = `sha256:${"c".repeat(64)}`;
+const hashD = `sha256:${"d".repeat(64)}`;
+
+const falseAuthorityFlags = Object.freeze({
+  providerCallsAllowed: false,
+  parserExecutionAllowed: false,
+  filesystemWriteAllowed: false,
+  sourceWriteAllowed: false,
+  rendererIpcExpansionAllowed: false,
+  rtmGenerationAllowed: false,
+  blkLinkAllowed: false,
+  beoPublicationAllowed: false,
+  protectedBodyAccessAllowed: false,
+  rawEvidenceSerializationAllowed: false
+});
+
+function candidateRecord(sequence = 7) {
+  return createAgentACandidateGenerationRecord(
+    {
+      source: "agent-a-bounded-output",
+      agentRole: "agent-a",
+      providerStatus: "not-called",
+      outputClass: "candidate-evidence",
+      contentFingerprint: hashC,
+      boundedEvidence: "present",
+      sanitizedSummary: "bounded Agent A evidence summary"
+    },
+    sequence
+  );
+}
+
+function admissionRecord(sequence = 7) {
+  const candidate = candidateRecord(sequence);
+  const readiness = createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition(candidate, 2);
+  const request = createAgentAPromotionRequestEnvelope(candidate, readiness, sequence);
+  const flags = { ...request.authorityFlags };
+  return createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord(
+    request,
+    {
+      governedFlowKind: "agent-a-governed-canonical-write",
+      invocationKind: "write-intent-admission",
+      mutationMode: "non-mutating",
+      effect: "status-only",
+      providerStatus: "not-called",
+      operatorReviewRequired: true,
+      promotionRequestId: request.promotionRequestId,
+      promotionReadinessId: request.promotionReadinessId,
+      candidateId: request.candidateId,
+      agentCandidateId: request.agentCandidateId,
+      candidateContentFingerprint: request.candidateContentFingerprint,
+      authorityFlags: flags,
+      ...flags
+    },
+    sequence
+  );
+}
+
+function transactionRecord(patch = {}) {
+  const txFlags = {
+    adjacentFileWriteAllowed: false,
+    multiFileWriteAllowed: false,
+    packageAliasWriteAllowed: false,
+    uncontrolledPackageWriteAllowed: false,
+    runtimeDispatchAllowed: false,
+    publicationAllowed: false,
+    callerRecoveryRecordAllowed: false
+  };
+  return createGovernedCanonicalWriteTransaction(
+    admissionRecord(),
+    {
+      targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
+      currentVersionHash: hashA,
+      packageKind: "controlled-fixture-package",
+      targetKind: "single-file",
+      fileCount: 1
+    },
+    {
+      targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
+      expectedCurrentVersionHash: hashA,
+      candidateContentFingerprint: hashC,
+      candidateReplacementHash: hashB,
+      fixtureOnlyOperatorReviewConfirmed: true,
+      authorityFlags: txFlags,
+      ...txFlags,
+      ...patch
+    }
+  );
+}
+
+function refreshEvidence(tx, patch = {}) {
+  return {
+    refreshKind: "post-transaction-readiness-refresh",
+    refreshStatus: "refresh-complete",
+    effect: "status-only",
+    providerStatus: "not-called",
+    parserExecutionStatus: "not-run",
+    filesystemWriteStatus: "not-written",
+    sourceWriteStatus: "not-written",
+    transactionId: tx.transactionId,
+    writeIntentId: tx.writeIntentId,
+    targetVersionHash: tx.targetVersionHash,
+    afterVersionHash: tx.afterVersionHash,
+    readinessRefreshRequired: tx.readinessRefreshRequired,
+    operatorReviewRequired: true,
+    authorityFlags: { ...falseAuthorityFlags },
+    ...falseAuthorityFlags,
+    ...patch
+  };
+}
+
+function assertRecordShape(record) {
+  assert.deepEqual(Object.keys(record), [
+    "readinessGateId",
+    "transactionId",
+    "writeIntentId",
+    "targetVersionHash",
+    "afterVersionHash",
+    "candidateContentFingerprint",
+    "readinessState",
+    "readyPresentationAllowed",
+    "refreshEvidenceStatus",
+    "failureReasons",
+    "readinessEvidenceHash",
+    "gateEvidenceHash",
+    "authorityFlags"
+  ]);
+  assert.match(record.gateEvidenceHash, /''^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
+  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(record), true);
+  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(record.authorityFlags), true);
+  assert.deepEqual(record.authorityFlags, falseAuthorityFlags);
+}
+
+{
+  assert.equal(
+    POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_CAPABILITY_ID,
+    "post-transaction-readiness-refresh-gate"
+  );
+  assert.deepEqual(POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_METHODS, [
+    "createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate"
+  ]);
+  assert.equal(
+    POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY.readinessStates.includes(
+      "post-transaction-ready"
+    ),
+    true
+  );
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, refreshEvidence(tx));
+  assertRecordShape(gate);
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessGateId, "post-transaction-readiness-refresh:0007");
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-ready");
+  assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, true);
+  assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-complete");
+  assert.deepEqual(gate.failureReasons, []);
+  assert.match(gate.readinessEvidenceHash, /''^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
+}
+
+{
+  const blockedTx = transactionRecord({ fixtureOnlyOperatorReviewConfirmed: false });
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(
+    blockedTx,
+    refreshEvidence(blockedTx)
+  );
+  assertRecordShape(gate);
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-not-required");
+  assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+  assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-not-required");
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessEvidenceHash, "");
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("transaction-not-committed"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx);
+  assertRecordShape(gate);
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-blocked");
+  assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+  assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-missing");
+  assert.deepEqual(gate.failureReasons, ["missing-refresh-evidence"]);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  for (const stalePatch of [
+    { transactionId: "governed-write-transaction:9999" },
+    { writeIntentId: "agent-a-write-intent:9999" },
+    { targetVersionHash: hashD },
+    { afterVersionHash: hashD }
+  ]) {
+    const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(
+      tx,
+      refreshEvidence(tx, stalePatch)
+    );
+    assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+    assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-malformed");
+    assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("stale-refresh-evidence"), true);
+  }
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  for (const badEvidence of [
+    null,
+    () => undefined,
+    Symbol("bad"),
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), extraField: "unexpected" },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), refreshStatus: "ready" },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), authorityFlags: { ...falseAuthorityFlags, rtmGenerationAllowed: true } },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), providerCallsAllowed: true },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), sourceText: "raw SysML body text" },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), rawPrompt: "RAW_PROMPT" }
+  ]) {
+    const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, badEvidence);
+    assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+    assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-blocked");
+    assert.equal(gate.readinessEvidenceHash, "");
+  }
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const { proxy, revoke } = Proxy.revocable(refreshEvidence(tx), {});
+  revoke();
+  assert.doesNotThrow(() => createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, proxy));
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, proxy);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("hostile-caller-object"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const getterEvidence = { ...refreshEvidence(tx) };
+  Object.defineProperty(getterEvidence, "refreshStatus", {
+    enumerable: true,
+    get() {
+      throw new Error("getter should not execute");
+    }
+  });
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, getterEvidence);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("hostile-caller-object"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const evidence = refreshEvidence(tx);
+  evidence.self = evidence;
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, evidence);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("unsupported-refresh-evidence-field"), true);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("hostile-caller-object"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const evidence = refreshEvidence(tx);
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, evidence);
+  const serialized = JSON.stringify(gate);
+  for (const forbidden of [
+    "raw SysML",
+    "RAW_PROMPT",
+    "providerPayload",
+    "credential",
+    "sourceText",
+    CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH
+  ]) {
+    assert.equal(serialized.includes(forbidden), false, forbidden);
+  }
+}
+
+{
+  for (const forbiddenSourceToken of [
+    "fetch(",
+    "XMLHttpRequest",
+    "ipcRenderer",
+    "writeFileSync",
+    "readFileSync(",
+    "providerPayload",
+    "providerClient",
+    "generateRTM",
+    "publishBEO",
+    "blk-link"
+  ]) {
+    assert.equal(sourceText.includes(forbiddenSourceToken), false, forbiddenSourceToken);
+  }
+}
+
+console.log("Governed post-transaction readiness refresh tests passed.");
PATCH'","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

@@ -0,0 +1,547 @@
+// K2-026 GOVERNED POST-TRANSACTION READINESS REFRESH: pure-data readiness gate only.
+// Trace: docs/traceability/K2_traceability.yaml (entry K2-026); Direct REQ: REQ-KN-075.
+// NO_PRODUCT_BEHAVIOR_K2_001: no filesystem writes, parser execution, provider calls, IPC, RTM, BLK link publication, BEO publication, or canonical mutation behavior.
+
+import { createHash } from "node:crypto";
+import { types as nodeUtilTypes } from "node:util";
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_CAPABILITY_ID =
+  "post-transaction-readiness-refresh-gate";
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_METHODS = Object.freeze([
+  "createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_STATES = Object.freeze([
+  "post-transaction-ready",
+  "post-transaction-blocked",
+  "post-transaction-not-required"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_EVIDENCE_STATUSES = Object.freeze([
+  "refresh-complete",
+  "refresh-missing",
+  "refresh-malformed",
+  "refresh-not-required"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_FAILURE_REASONS = Object.freeze([
+  "transaction-not-committed",
+  "missing-refresh-evidence",
+  "malformed-transaction-record",
+  "malformed-refresh-evidence",
+  "stale-refresh-evidence",
+  "contradictory-refresh-evidence",
+  "unsupported-refresh-evidence-field",
+  "hostile-caller-object",
+  "denied-authority-claim",
+  "raw-material-leakage-claim"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY = Object.freeze({
+  readinessStates: POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_STATES,
+  refreshEvidenceStatuses: POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_EVIDENCE_STATUSES,
+  failureReasons: POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_FAILURE_REASONS
+});
+
+const OUTPUT_KEYS = Object.freeze([
+  "readinessGateId",
+  "transactionId",
+  "writeIntentId",
+  "targetVersionHash",
+  "afterVersionHash",
+  "candidateContentFingerprint",
+  "readinessState",
+  "readyPresentationAllowed",
+  "refreshEvidenceStatus",
+  "failureReasons",
+  "readinessEvidenceHash",
+  "gateEvidenceHash",
+  "authorityFlags"
+]);
+
+const FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS = deepFreeze({
+  providerCallsAllowed: false,
+  parserExecutionAllowed: false,
+  filesystemWriteAllowed: false,
+  sourceWriteAllowed: false,
+  rendererIpcExpansionAllowed: false,
+  rtmGenerationAllowed: false,
+  blkLinkAllowed: false,
+  beoPublicationAllowed: false,
+  protectedBodyAccessAllowed: false,
+  rawEvidenceSerializationAllowed: false
+});
+
+const REQUIRED_REFRESH_FIELDS = Object.freeze([
+  "refreshKind",
+  "refreshStatus",
+  "effect",
+  "providerStatus",
+  "parserExecutionStatus",
+  "filesystemWriteStatus",
+  "sourceWriteStatus",
+  "transactionId",
+  "writeIntentId",
+  "targetVersionHash",
+  "afterVersionHash",
+  "readinessRefreshRequired",
+  "operatorReviewRequired",
+  "authorityFlags"
+]);
+
+const OPTIONAL_FALSE_FLAG_FIELDS = Object.freeze(Object.keys(FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS));
+const ALLOWED_REFRESH_FIELDS = new Set([
+  ...REQUIRED_REFRESH_FIELDS,
+  ...OPTIONAL_FALSE_FLAG_FIELDS
+]);
+
+const DENIED_FIELD_PARTS = Object.freeze([
+  ["provider"],
+  ["parser"],
+  ["runtime"],
+  ["dispatch"],
+  ["filesystem"],
+  ["source"],
+  ["write"],
+  ["mutation"],
+  ["canonical"],
+  ["save"],
+  ["export"],
+  ["session"],
+  ["publication"],
+  ["signer"],
+  ["storage"],
+  ["ledger"],
+  ["approval"],
+  ["rt", "m"],
+  ["blk", "link"],
+  ["beo"],
+  ["ipc"]
+]);
+
+const RAW_FIELD_PARTS = Object.freeze([
+  ["raw"],
+  ["source", "text"],
+  ["prompt"],
+  ["body"],
+  ["sysml"],
+  ["kerml"],
+  ["path"],
+  ["file"],
+  ["diagnostic"],
+  ["credential"],
+  ["secret"],
+  ["token"],
+  ["api", "key"],
+  ["provider", "payload"],
+  ["provider", "request"],
+  ["provider", "response"]
+]);
+
+function deepFreeze(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
+  if (!value || typeof value !== "object" || Object.isFrozen(value)) {
+    return value;
+  }
+  if (seen.has(value)) {
+    return value;
+  }
+  seen.add(value);
+  for (const child of Object.values(value)) {
+    deepFreeze(child, seen);
+  }
+  return Object.freeze(value);
+}
+
+function canonicalJson(value) {
+  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
+    return `[${value.map((item) => canonicalJson(item)).join(",")}]`;
+  }
+  if (value && typeof value === "object") {
+    return `{${Object.keys(value)
+      .sort()
+      .map((key) => `${JSON.stringify(key)}:${canonicalJson(value[key])}`)
+      .join(",")}}`;
+  }
+  return JSON.stringify(value);
+}
+
+function evidenceHash(value) {
+  return `sha256:${createHash("sha256").update(canonicalJson(value)).digest("hex")}`;
+}
+
+function normalizeToken(value) {
+  return String(value).toLowerCase().replace(/[''^a-z0-9]/gu, "");
+}
+
+function hasParts(normalized, parts) {
+  return normalized.includes(parts.join(""));
+}
+
+function addReason(reasons, reason) {
+  if (!reasons.includes(reason)) {
+    reasons.push(reason);
+  }
+}
+
+function descriptorsFor(value, reasons) {
+  try {
+    if (!value || typeof value !== "object") {
+      return null;
+    }
+    if (nodeUtilTypes.isProxy(value)) {
+      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+      return null;
+    }
+    return Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(value);
+  } catch {
+    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    return null;
+  }
+}
+
+function dataValue(descriptors, key, reasons) {
+  const descriptor = descriptors?.[key];
+  if (!descriptor) {
+    return undefined;
+  }
+  if ("get" in descriptor || "set" in descriptor || !Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(descriptor, "value")) {
+    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    return undefined;
+  }
+  return descriptor.value;
+}
+
+function isHash(value) {
+  return typeof value === "string" && /''^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u.test(value);
+}
+
+function validTransactionId(value) {
+  return (
+    typeof value === "string" &&
+    value.startsWith("governed-write-transaction:") &&
+    /''^'"\\d{4}"'$/u.test(value.slice("governed-write-transaction:".length))
+  );
+}
+
+function validWriteIntentId(value) {
+  return (
+    typeof value === "string" &&
+    value.startsWith("agent-a-write-intent:") &&
+    /''^'"\\d{4}"'$/u.test(value.slice("agent-a-write-intent:".length))
+  );
+}
+
+function analyzeTransaction(transactionRecord) {
+  const reasons = [];
+  const descriptors = descriptorsFor(transactionRecord, reasons);
+  const record = {
+    transactionId: "",
+    writeIntentId: "",
+    targetVersionHash: "",
+    afterVersionHash: "",
+    candidateContentFingerprint: "",
+    committed: false,
+    refreshRequired: false,
+    failureReasons: []
+  };
+
+  if (!descriptors) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+    return { record, reasons };
+  }
+
+  const transactionId = dataValue(descriptors, "transactionId", reasons);
+  const writeIntentId = dataValue(descriptors, "writeIntentId", reasons);
+  const targetVersionHash = dataValue(descriptors, "targetVersionHash", reasons);
+  const afterVersionHash = dataValue(descriptors, "afterVersionHash", reasons);
+  const candidateContentFingerprint = dataValue(
+    descriptors,
+    "candidateContentFingerprint",
+    reasons
+  );
+  const transactionState = dataValue(descriptors, "transactionState", reasons);
+  const commitStatus = dataValue(descriptors, "commitStatus", reasons);
+  const recoveryStatus = dataValue(descriptors, "recoveryStatus", reasons);
+  const readinessRefreshRequired = dataValue(
+    descriptors,
+    "readinessRefreshRequired",
+    reasons
+  );
+  const failureReasons = dataValue(descriptors, "failureReasons", reasons);
+  const authorityFlags = dataValue(descriptors, "authorityFlags", reasons);
+
+  if (!validTransactionId(transactionId)) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+  } else {
+    record.transactionId = transactionId;
+  }
+  if (!validWriteIntentId(writeIntentId)) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+  } else {
+    record.writeIntentId = writeIntentId;
+  }
+  if (!isHash(targetVersionHash) || !isHash(afterVersionHash) || !isHash(candidateContentFingerprint)) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+  } else {
+    record.targetVersionHash = targetVersionHash;
+    record.afterVersionHash = afterVersionHash;
+    record.candidateContentFingerprint = candidateContentFingerprint;
+  }
+  if (!Array.isArray(failureReasons)) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+  } else {
+    record.failureReasons = failureReasons.filter((reason) => typeof reason === "string");
+  }
+  if (!authorityFlags || typeof authorityFlags !== "object") {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-transaction-record");
+  }
+
+  record.committed =
+    transactionState === "transaction-committed" &&
+    commitStatus === "fixture-package-record-updated" &&
+    recoveryStatus === "recovery-recorded" &&
+    readinessRefreshRequired === true &&
+    Array.isArray(failureReasons) &&
+    failureReasons.length === 0 &&
+    reasons.length === 0;
+  record.refreshRequired = readinessRefreshRequired === true;
+
+  if (!record.committed) {
+    addReason(reasons, "transaction-not-committed");
+  }
+
+  return { record, reasons };
+}
+
+function scanEvidenceValue(value, reasons, depth = 0, seen = new WeakSet()) {
+  if (depth > 8) {
+    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    return;
+  }
+  if (typeof value === "string") {
+    const normalized = normalizeToken(value);
+    if (DENIED_FIELD_PARTS.some((parts) => hasParts(normalized, parts))) {
+      addReason(reasons, "denied-authority-claim");
+    }
+    if (RAW_FIELD_PARTS.some((parts) => hasParts(normalized, parts))) {
+      addReason(reasons, "raw-material-leakage-claim");
+    }
+    return;
+  }
+  if (value === null || typeof value === "boolean") {
+    return;
+  }
+  if (typeof value === "number") {
+    if (!Number.isFinite(value)) {
+      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    }
+    return;
+  }
+  if (typeof value === "bigint" || typeof value === "symbol" || typeof value === "function") {
+    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    return;
+  }
+  if (!value || typeof value !== "object") {
+    return;
+  }
+  if (seen.has(value)) {
+    addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+    return;
+  }
+  seen.add(value);
+  const descriptors = descriptorsFor(value, reasons);
+  if (!descriptors) {
+    return;
+  }
+  for (const [key, descriptor] of Object.entries(descriptors)) {
+    const normalizedKey = normalizeToken(key);
+    if (DENIED_FIELD_PARTS.some((parts) => hasParts(normalizedKey, parts))) {
+      addReason(reasons, "denied-authority-claim");
+    }
+    if (RAW_FIELD_PARTS.some((parts) => hasParts(normalizedKey, parts))) {
+      addReason(reasons, "raw-material-leakage-claim");
+    }
+    if ("get" in descriptor || "set" in descriptor) {
+      addReason(reasons, "hostile-caller-object");
+      continue;
+    }
+    scanEvidenceValue(descriptor.value, reasons, depth + 1, seen);
+  }
+}
+
+function analyzeRefreshEvidence(evidence, transaction) {
+  const reasons = [];
+  const descriptors = descriptorsFor(evidence, reasons);
+  if (!descriptors) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-refresh-evidence");
+    return { reasons, sanitized: null };
+  }
+
+  const keys = Object.keys(descriptors).sort();
+  for (const key of keys) {
+    if (!ALLOWED_REFRESH_FIELDS.has(key)) {
+      addReason(reasons, "unsupported-refresh-evidence-field");
+      scanEvidenceValue(key, reasons);
+      scanEvidenceValue(dataValue(descriptors, key, reasons), reasons);
+    }
+  }
+  for (const key of REQUIRED_REFRESH_FIELDS) {
+    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(descriptors, key)) {
+      addReason(reasons, "malformed-refresh-evidence");
+    }
+  }
+
+  const value = (key) => dataValue(descriptors, key, reasons);
+  const authorityFlags = value("authorityFlags");
+  const authorityDescriptors = descriptorsFor(authorityFlags, reasons);
+  if (!authorityDescriptors) {
+    addReason(reasons, "malformed-refresh-evidence");
+  }
+  for (const flag of OPTIONAL_FALSE_FLAG_FIELDS) {
+    const nested = authorityDescriptors ? dataValue(authorityDescriptors, flag, reasons) : undefined;
+    if (nested !== false) {
+      addReason(reasons, "denied-authority-claim");
+    }
+    if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(descriptors, flag) && value(flag) !== false) {
+      addReason(reasons, "denied-authority-claim");
+    }
+  }
+
+  const expected = {
+    refreshKind: "post-transaction-readiness-refresh",
+    refreshStatus: "refresh-complete",
+    effect: "status-only",
+    providerStatus: "not-called",
+    parserExecutionStatus: "not-run",
+    filesystemWriteStatus: "not-written",
+    sourceWriteStatus: "not-written",
+    transactionId: transaction.transactionId,
+    writeIntentId: transaction.writeIntentId,
+    targetVersionHash: transaction.targetVersionHash,
+    afterVersionHash: transaction.afterVersionHash,
+    readinessRefreshRequired: true,
+    operatorReviewRequired: true
+  };
+
+  for (const [key, expectedValue] of Object.entries(expected)) {
+    if (value(key) !== expectedValue) {
+      addReason(
+        reasons,
+        key === "transactionId" ||
+          key === "writeIntentId" ||
+          key === "targetVersionHash" ||
+          key === "afterVersionHash"
+          ? "stale-refresh-evidence"
+          : "contradictory-refresh-evidence"
+      );
+    }
+  }
+
+  if (reasons.length > 0) {
+    return { reasons, sanitized: null };
+  }
+
+  const sanitized = {
+    refreshKind: expected.refreshKind,
+    refreshStatus: expected.refreshStatus,
+    effect: expected.effect,
+    transactionId: expected.transactionId,
+    writeIntentId: expected.writeIntentId,
+    targetVersionHash: expected.targetVersionHash,
+    afterVersionHash: expected.afterVersionHash,
+    readinessRefreshRequired: true,
+    operatorReviewRequired: true,
+    authorityFlags: FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS
+  };
+  return { reasons, sanitized };
+}
+
+function createRecord({ transaction, state, evidenceStatus, reasons, evidence }) {
+  const readinessEvidenceHash = evidence ? evidenceHash(evidence) : "";
+  const material = {
+    readinessGateId: gateIdFor(transaction.transactionId),
+    transactionId: transaction.transactionId,
+    writeIntentId: transaction.writeIntentId,
+    targetVersionHash: transaction.targetVersionHash,
+    afterVersionHash: transaction.afterVersionHash,
+    candidateContentFingerprint: transaction.candidateContentFingerprint,
+    readinessState: state,
+    readyPresentationAllowed: state === "post-transaction-ready",
+    refreshEvidenceStatus: evidenceStatus,
+    failureReasons: reasons,
+    readinessEvidenceHash,
+    authorityFlags: FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS
+  };
+  const gateEvidenceHash = evidenceHash(material);
+  return deepFreeze({
+    readinessGateId: material.readinessGateId,
+    transactionId: material.transactionId,
+    writeIntentId: material.writeIntentId,
+    targetVersionHash: material.targetVersionHash,
+    afterVersionHash: material.afterVersionHash,
+    candidateContentFingerprint: material.candidateContentFingerprint,
+    readinessState: material.readinessState,
+    readyPresentationAllowed: material.readyPresentationAllowed,
+    refreshEvidenceStatus: material.refreshEvidenceStatus,
+    failureReasons: material.failureReasons,
+    readinessEvidenceHash: material.readinessEvidenceHash,
+    gateEvidenceHash,
+    authorityFlags: FALSE_AUTHORITY_FLAGS
+  });
+}
+
+function gateIdFor(transactionId) {
+  const suffix = validTransactionId(transactionId)
+    ? transactionId.slice("governed-write-transaction:".length)
+    : "0000";
+  return `post-transaction-readiness-refresh:${suffix}`;
+}
+
+export function createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(
+  transactionRecord = undefined,
+  refreshEvidence = undefined
+) {
+  const transactionAnalysis = analyzeTransaction(transactionRecord);
+  const transaction = transactionAnalysis.record;
+  const reasons = [...transactionAnalysis.reasons];
+
+  if (!transaction.committed) {
+    return createRecord({
+      transaction,
+      state: "post-transaction-not-required",
+      evidenceStatus: "refresh-not-required",
+      reasons,
+      evidence: null
+    });
+  }
+
+  if (refreshEvidence === undefined || refreshEvidence === null) {
+    return createRecord({
+      transaction,
+      state: "post-transaction-blocked",
+      evidenceStatus: "refresh-missing",
+      reasons: ["missing-refresh-evidence"],
+      evidence: null
+    });
+  }
+
+  const evidenceAnalysis = analyzeRefreshEvidence(refreshEvidence, transaction);
+  if (evidenceAnalysis.reasons.length > 0) {
+    return createRecord({
+      transaction,
+      state: "post-transaction-blocked",
+      evidenceStatus: "refresh-malformed",
+      reasons: evidenceAnalysis.reasons,
+      evidence: null
+    });
+  }
+
+  return createRecord({
+    transaction,
+    state: "post-transaction-ready",
+    evidenceStatus: "refresh-complete",
+    reasons: [],
+    evidence: evidenceAnalysis.sanitized
+  });
+}

diff --git a/tests/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.test.mjs b/tests/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.test.mjs
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..59414bb
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.test.mjs
@@ -0,0 +1,318 @@
+import assert from "node:assert/strict";
+import { readFileSync } from "node:fs";
+import { join, resolve } from "node:path";
+import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
+
+import {
+  POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY,
+  POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_CAPABILITY_ID,
+  POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_METHODS,
+  createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate
+} from "../src/shared/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.mjs";
+import {
+  CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
+  createGovernedCanonicalWriteTransaction
+} from "../src/shared/governed-write-transaction.mjs";
+import { createAgentACandidateGenerationRecord } from "../src/shared/agent-a-candidate-generation.mjs";
+import { createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition } from "../src/shared/agent-a-promotion-readiness.mjs";
+import { createAgentAPromotionRequestEnvelope } from "../src/shared/agent-a-promotion-request.mjs";
+import { createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord } from "../src/shared/agent-a-write-admission.mjs";
+
+const __dirname = fileURLToPath(new URL(".", import.meta.url));
+const root = resolve(__dirname, "..");
+// RED evidence before implementation: ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for the new shared module.
+const sourceText = readFileSync(
+  join(root, "src/shared/governed-post-transaction-readiness-refresh.mjs"),
+  "utf8"
+);
+
+const hashA = `sha256:${"a".repeat(64)}`;
+const hashB = `sha256:${"b".repeat(64)}`;
+const hashC = `sha256:${"c".repeat(64)}`;
+const hashD = `sha256:${"d".repeat(64)}`;
+
+const falseAuthorityFlags = Object.freeze({
+  providerCallsAllowed: false,
+  parserExecutionAllowed: false,
+  filesystemWriteAllowed: false,
+  sourceWriteAllowed: false,
+  rendererIpcExpansionAllowed: false,
+  rtmGenerationAllowed: false,
+  blkLinkAllowed: false,
+  beoPublicationAllowed: false,
+  protectedBodyAccessAllowed: false,
+  rawEvidenceSerializationAllowed: false
+});
+
+function candidateRecord(sequence = 7) {
+  return createAgentACandidateGenerationRecord(
+    {
+      source: "agent-a-bounded-output",
+      agentRole: "agent-a",
+      providerStatus: "not-called",
+      outputClass: "candidate-evidence",
+      contentFingerprint: hashC,
+      boundedEvidence: "present",
+      sanitizedSummary: "bounded Agent A evidence summary"
+    },
+    sequence
+  );
+}
+
+function admissionRecord(sequence = 7) {
+  const candidate = candidateRecord(sequence);
+  const readiness = createAgentAPromotionReadinessDisposition(candidate, 2);
+  const request = createAgentAPromotionRequestEnvelope(candidate, readiness, sequence);
+  const flags = { ...request.authorityFlags };
+  return createAgentAWriteAdmissionRecord(
+    request,
+    {
+      governedFlowKind: "agent-a-governed-canonical-write",
+      invocationKind: "write-intent-admission",
+      mutationMode: "non-mutating",
+      effect: "status-only",
+      providerStatus: "not-called",
+      operatorReviewRequired: true,
+      promotionRequestId: request.promotionRequestId,
+      promotionReadinessId: request.promotionReadinessId,
+      candidateId: request.candidateId,
+      agentCandidateId: request.agentCandidateId,
+      candidateContentFingerprint: request.candidateContentFingerprint,
+      authorityFlags: flags,
+      ...flags
+    },
+    sequence
+  );
+}
+
+function transactionRecord(patch = {}) {
+  const txFlags = {
+    adjacentFileWriteAllowed: false,
+    multiFileWriteAllowed: false,
+    packageAliasWriteAllowed: false,
+    uncontrolledPackageWriteAllowed: false,
+    runtimeDispatchAllowed: false,
+    publicationAllowed: false,
+    callerRecoveryRecordAllowed: false
+  };
+  return createGovernedCanonicalWriteTransaction(
+    admissionRecord(),
+    {
+      targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
+      currentVersionHash: hashA,
+      packageKind: "controlled-fixture-package",
+      targetKind: "single-file",
+      fileCount: 1
+    },
+    {
+      targetPackagePath: CONTROLLED_FIXTURE_PACKAGE_PATH,
+      expectedCurrentVersionHash: hashA,
+      candidateContentFingerprint: hashC,
+      candidateReplacementHash: hashB,
+      fixtureOnlyOperatorReviewConfirmed: true,
+      authorityFlags: txFlags,
+      ...txFlags,
+      ...patch
+    }
+  );
+}
+
+function refreshEvidence(tx, patch = {}) {
+  return {
+    refreshKind: "post-transaction-readiness-refresh",
+    refreshStatus: "refresh-complete",
+    effect: "status-only",
+    providerStatus: "not-called",
+    parserExecutionStatus: "not-run",
+    filesystemWriteStatus: "not-written",
+    sourceWriteStatus: "not-written",
+    transactionId: tx.transactionId,
+    writeIntentId: tx.writeIntentId,
+    targetVersionHash: tx.targetVersionHash,
+    afterVersionHash: tx.afterVersionHash,
+    readinessRefreshRequired: tx.readinessRefreshRequired,
+    operatorReviewRequired: true,
+    authorityFlags: { ...falseAuthorityFlags },
+    ...falseAuthorityFlags,
+    ...patch
+  };
+}
+
+function assertRecordShape(record) {
+  assert.deepEqual(Object.keys(record), [
+    "readinessGateId",
+    "transactionId",
+    "writeIntentId",
+    "targetVersionHash",
+    "afterVersionHash",
+    "candidateContentFingerprint",
+    "readinessState",
+    "readyPresentationAllowed",
+    "refreshEvidenceStatus",
+    "failureReasons",
+    "readinessEvidenceHash",
+    "gateEvidenceHash",
+    "authorityFlags"
+  ]);
+  assert.match(record.gateEvidenceHash, /''^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
+  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(record), true);
+  assert.equal(Object.isFrozen(record.authorityFlags), true);
+  assert.deepEqual(record.authorityFlags, falseAuthorityFlags);
+}
+
+{
+  assert.equal(
+    POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_CAPABILITY_ID,
+    "post-transaction-readiness-refresh-gate"
+  );
+  assert.deepEqual(POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_METHODS, [
+    "createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate"
+  ]);
+  assert.equal(
+    POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY.readinessStates.includes(
+      "post-transaction-ready"
+    ),
+    true
+  );
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, refreshEvidence(tx));
+  assertRecordShape(gate);
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessGateId, "post-transaction-readiness-refresh:0007");
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-ready");
+  assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, true);
+  assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-complete");
+  assert.deepEqual(gate.failureReasons, []);
+  assert.match(gate.readinessEvidenceHash, /''^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/u);
+}
+
+{
+  const blockedTx = transactionRecord({ fixtureOnlyOperatorReviewConfirmed: false });
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(
+    blockedTx,
+    refreshEvidence(blockedTx)
+  );
+  assertRecordShape(gate);
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-not-required");
+  assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+  assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-not-required");
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessEvidenceHash, "");
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("transaction-not-committed"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx);
+  assertRecordShape(gate);
+  assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-blocked");
+  assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+  assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-missing");
+  assert.deepEqual(gate.failureReasons, ["missing-refresh-evidence"]);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  for (const stalePatch of [
+    { transactionId: "governed-write-transaction:9999" },
+    { writeIntentId: "agent-a-write-intent:9999" },
+    { targetVersionHash: hashD },
+    { afterVersionHash: hashD }
+  ]) {
+    const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(
+      tx,
+      refreshEvidence(tx, stalePatch)
+    );
+    assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+    assert.equal(gate.refreshEvidenceStatus, "refresh-malformed");
+    assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("stale-refresh-evidence"), true);
+  }
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  for (const badEvidence of [
+    null,
+    () => undefined,
+    Symbol("bad"),
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), extraField: "unexpected" },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), refreshStatus: "ready" },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), authorityFlags: { ...falseAuthorityFlags, rtmGenerationAllowed: true } },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), providerCallsAllowed: true },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), sourceText: "raw SysML body text" },
+    { ...refreshEvidence(tx), rawPrompt: "RAW_PROMPT" }
+  ]) {
+    const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, badEvidence);
+    assert.equal(gate.readyPresentationAllowed, false);
+    assert.equal(gate.readinessState, "post-transaction-blocked");
+    assert.equal(gate.readinessEvidenceHash, "");
+  }
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const { proxy, revoke } = Proxy.revocable(refreshEvidence(tx), {});
+  revoke();
+  assert.doesNotThrow(() => createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, proxy));
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, proxy);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("hostile-caller-object"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const getterEvidence = { ...refreshEvidence(tx) };
+  Object.defineProperty(getterEvidence, "refreshStatus", {
+    enumerable: true,
+    get() {
+      throw new Error("getter should not execute");
+    }
+  });
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, getterEvidence);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("hostile-caller-object"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const evidence = refreshEvidence(tx);
+  evidence.self = evidence;
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, evidence);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("unsupported-refresh-evidence-field"), true);
+  assert.equal(gate.failureReasons.includes("hostile-caller-object"), true);
+}
+
+{
+  const tx = transactionRecord();
+  const evidence = refreshEvidence(tx);
+  const gate = createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate(tx, evidence);
+  const serialized = JSON.stringify(gate);
+  for (const forbidden of [

+// K2-026 GOVERNED POST-TRANSACTION READINESS REFRESH: pure-data readiness gate only.
+// Trace: docs/traceability/K2_traceability.yaml (entry K2-026); Direct REQ: REQ-KN-075.
+// NO_PRODUCT_BEHAVIOR_K2_001: no filesystem writes, parser execution, provider calls, IPC, RTM, BLK link publication, BEO publication, or canonical mutation behavior.
+
+import { createHash } from "node:crypto";
+import { types as nodeUtilTypes } from "node:util";
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_CAPABILITY_ID =
+  "post-transaction-readiness-refresh-gate";
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_METHODS = Object.freeze([
+  "createPostTransactionReadinessRefreshGate"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_STATES = Object.freeze([
+  "post-transaction-ready",
+  "post-transaction-blocked",
+  "post-transaction-not-required"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_EVIDENCE_STATUSES = Object.freeze([
+  "refresh-complete",
+  "refresh-missing",
+  "refresh-malformed",
+  "refresh-not-required"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_FAILURE_REASONS = Object.freeze([
+  "transaction-not-committed",
+  "missing-refresh-evidence",
+  "malformed-transaction-record",
+  "malformed-refresh-evidence",
+  "stale-refresh-evidence",
+  "contradictory-refresh-evidence",
+  "unsupported-refresh-evidence-field",
+  "hostile-caller-object",
+  "denied-authority-claim",
+  "raw-material-leakage-claim"
+]);
+
+export const POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_ALLOWED_VOCABULARY = Object.freeze({
+  readinessStates: POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_STATES,
+  refreshEvidenceStatuses: POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_EVIDENCE_STATUSES,
+  failureReasons: POST_TRANSACTION_READINESS_REFRESH_FAILURE_REASONS
+});
+
+const OUTPUT_KEYS = Object.freeze([
+  "readinessGateId",
+  "transactionId",
+  "writeIntentId",
+  "targetVersionHash",
+  "afterVersionHash",
+  "candidateContentFingerprint",

+

+function deepFreeze(value, seen = new WeakSet()) {
+  if (!value || typeof value !== "object" || Object.isFrozen(value)) {
